failures.description: No failure occurred in the provided trajectory.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify available Mechanical Keyboards with RGB backlight costing strictly more than $233.90. The agent correctly called ProductCatalogSearch with available_only=true, backlight=RGB, and product_type=Mechanical Keyboard. The tool returned five items, of which only item_id 1151293680 at 272.33 and item_id 2299424241 at 237.48 are strictly greater than 233.90. The executor returned exactly those two items, and the evaluator approved. No unresolved failure is evident.
